g.text: “Total remains close to conventional when operation is mostly continuous"
“Accumulated cost is higher: repeated starts are explicitly charged"
• Continuous operation: both methods give similar O&M totals
Intermittent operation: dynamic allocation penalizes frequent GT cycling
sensitive GT O&M allocation used in this study. Compared with a purely hour
assiqns additional burden to frequent start
stop behavior, thereby distinquishing continuous from intermittent GT operation more
